site.name: Surgical Insight Hub
site.differentiator: The only surgical education resource written by a surgeon, for the overnight shift.

notes.title: Anorectal Malformation
notes.description: Peña/Krickenbeck classification, VACTERL associations, PSARP steps, colostomy principles, cloaca management, bowel management programme.

notes.title: Bowel Obstruction
notes.description: SBO/LBO classification, Bologna criteria, WSES 2020 management algorithm, strangulation recognition, operative decision-making.

notes.title: PUD Perforation
notes.description: Boey score, omental patch technique, resection indications, H. pylori eradication protocol.

notes.title: Fournier's Gangrene
notes.description: FGSI scoring, debridement extent, reconstruction timing, colostomy indications, mortality predictors.

notes.title: Choledocholithiasis
notes.description: ASGE 2019 risk stratification, ERCP indications, laparoscopic CBD exploration, MRCP pathway.

notes.title: HPB Surgery
notes.description: Biliary anatomy, BDI Strasberg, cholangiocarcinoma Bismuth-Corlette, Whipple steps, portal HTN.

notes.title: Anesthesia & Perioperative Care
notes.description: RSI, airway decision tree, regional vs general anaesthesia, postop pain protocols, ICU handover.

notes.title: High-Yield CT Imaging Findings
notes.description: Free air, pneumatosis, volvulus, closed loop, ischaemia — rapid surgical pattern recognition.
